description: Recommended MCP servers for Colophony development. Copy these to ~/.claude/settings.json under 'mcpServers'.

postgres.description: Direct database queries and schema exploration

redis.description: Redis inspection for BullMQ jobs, sessions, and cache debugging

context7.description: Library documentation lookup (use 'use context7' in prompts)

github.description: GitHub operations - PRs, issues, commits, CI/CD workflows
notes: Required permissions: Contents (read/write), Pull requests (read/write), Issues (read/write)
For CI status, also add: Actions (read)

playwright.description: Browser automation for E2E testing frontend flows
notes: Enables browser-level automation for testing auth flows, submissions, payments
Useful for visual regression testing and E2E test generation
Requires Playwright browsers: npx playwright install

stripe.description: Stripe API access and documentation search
notes: Replace STRIPE_SECRET_KEY with your test mode key
For production, use restricted keys with minimal permissions
Available tool subsets: customers, products, prices, invoices, subscriptions

docker.description: Docker container inspection — logs, health, stats, exec
notes: Useful for deployment phase: inspect container health, read logs, check resource usage
Can list containers, read logs, inspect health checks, and view stats
Replaces manual 'docker compose logs' and 'docker stats' commands

email-preview.description: Email preview is handled via Ethereal (built into EmailService)
usage: In development, EmailService logs preview URLs when SMTP_HOST is not set
For manual testing, use: https://ethereal.email to create test accounts
The EmailService auto-disables in dev when SMTP is not configured

servers: playwright - E2E testing of auth, submission, and payment flows
github - CI/CD setup, PR automation, deployment workflows
redis - Debug BullMQ job queues and session state
